summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of SentinelGrid. 20/21 pytest backend tests pass (1 real bug: graph has 23 nodes/27 edges vs spec 25-30/40-50). All frontend flows tested: Landing role selection, Citizen scam-check (LLM verdict = Confirmed Scam), NCRB toast, Officer transcript analyze + MHA draft, Officer counterfeit list, Admin dashboard KPI + alerts, Admin graph with cluster-A intel report + export-pdf, Admin map + filter-scam + patrol-list, Cases table + sheet with case-status/case-assignee, and role-switcher dropdown all functional.

critical.issue: Seed graph has only 23 nodes and 27 edges; spec requires 25-30 nodes and 40-50 edges. seed_data.py needs to add more nodes/edges (esp. edges — currently ~27 vs required 40-50).

action_items: Increase SEED_GRAPH in /app/backend/seed_data.py to produce 25-30 nodes and 40-50 edges (currently 23 nodes / 27 edges). Ensure new nodes have 'cluster' field.

Note: /officer/transcript and /officer/counterfeit are only reachable after selecting the Officer role via Landing (Guard redirects to '/' if role is not set). This is by design but should be documented; direct navigation to /officer/* without role selection currently bounces to landing.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `_extract_json` regex `\{.*?\}` (non-greedy) then greedy fallback are both attempted — good defensive handling. LLM failure fallback with deterministic defaults is well-implemented.
server.py `simulate_alert` accepts `payload: dict` implicit body but is called as POST with empty body — currently endpoint signature has no body param (correct). Frontend just POSTs — works.
seed_data.py graph generation must be expanded to meet spec (25-30 nodes / 40-50 edges).
server.py counterfeit_analyze: catches LLM failure well; PNG upload tested successfully.
server.py alerts endpoint has default limit=30 but tests found >100 alerts after test runs — consider capping or a periodic cleanup of test-generated data.
Frontend App.js Guard uses Navigate to '/' when role is missing — this can confuse deep-link users but is per-design for demo.
test_credentials: None required — demo app; role selection via landing page.
seed_data_creation: Auto-seeded by backend on startup (scam_checks, counterfeit, graph_nodes/edges, hotspots, cases, alerts).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend base URL is https://crime-intel-nexus.preview.emergentagent.com. All flows work correctly except graph seed counts. LLM (Gemini 3 Flash via Emergent) works and returns real verdicts (tested Confirmed Scam for CBI/Aadhaar impersonation). Frontend routing requires role selection first via Landing (guard-based). Test PNG generator in backend_test.py is deterministic.
rca of the issue: Graph nodes/edges shortage: /app/backend/seed_data.py generator produces fixed set of ring-A/B/C nodes with 23 total nodes and 27 edges. To satisfy spec (25-30/40-50), add ~2-7 more nodes (e.g., more mule accounts or victims) and ~13-23 more edges (cross-cluster links or victim→account edges). Reproduction: `curl <base>/api/graph | jq '.nodes|length, .edges|length'` returns 23, 27. Mitigation: expand SEED_GRAPH construction in seed_data.py, drop DB collections graph_nodes/graph_edges (or wipe DB) so ensure_seed reseeds on next startup.
